name: Arafura Rare Earths Limited
description: Arafura Rare Earths Limited is an Australian mineral exploration and development company focusing on production of rare earth products. Its flagship project is the Nolans Neodymium-Praseodymium (NdPr) Project, located in the Northern Territory of Australia. The project is a premier NdPr resource, which is essential for high-strength permanent magnets used in electric vehicles, wind turbines, and other clean energy technologies. The company aims to become a trusted, long-term global supplier of sustainably mined and processed rare earth materials.
